，部分战役描写不够好，但总体上瑕不掩瑜。对于日更的网文来说，作者的能力非常强，没有被更新的节奏带着跑，整本书写到现在进入后期，依然保持了一贯的风格，足见作者的功力，也说明作者在设定大纲这块下了非常大的功夫。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1681841394,"group_id":"7089385014520974373","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Ny6AdFPPOC3zwmS93eIL7CY=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/08dfc6c1e7f64e0d8e67929d4aa29605~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776879278&x-signature=0fHrPXnSIbUpZz%2BKzZ%2FN9mFGLD4%3D","user_id":"6680159095","user_name":"佩德罗尔"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"6680159095","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1664292656,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7089385014520974373","book_info":{"abstract":"【战争+热血+历史】
